# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact-name: build-output
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist
          echo "Compiled application files" > dist/app.txt
          chmod +x scripts/deploy-dev.sh scripts/deploy-stage.sh scripts/deploy-prod.sh || true

      - name: Package deployment scripts
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifact/scripts
          cp -r dist artifact/
          if [ -d scripts ]; then
            cp -r scripts artifact/
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: artifact/
          if-no-files-found: error

  deploy-dev:
    name: Deploy to Development
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    environment: development
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: ./artifact

      - name: Show downloaded contents
        run: ls -R ./artifact

      - name: Execute development deployment
        run: |
          if [ -f ./artifact/scripts/deploy-dev.sh ]; then
            chmod +x ./artifact/scripts/deploy-dev.sh
            ./artifact/scripts/deploy-dev.sh
          else
            echo "No deploy-dev.sh found, running placeholder deployment"
            echo "Deploying to development using artifacts in ./artifact/dist"
          fi

  deploy-stage:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - deploy-dev
    environment: staging
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: ./artifact

      - name: Show downloaded contents
        run: ls -R ./artifact

      - name: Execute staging deployment
        run: |
          if [ -f ./artifact/scripts/deploy-stage.sh ]; then
            chmod +x ./artifact/scripts/deploy-stage.sh
            ./artifact/scripts/deploy-stage.sh
          else
            echo "No deploy-stage.sh found, running placeholder deployment"
            echo "Deploying to staging using artifacts in ./artifact/dist"
          fi

  deploy-prod:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - deploy-stage
    environment: production
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: ./artifact

      - name: Show downloaded contents
        run: ls -R ./artifact

      - name: Execute production deployment
        run: |
          if [ -f ./artifact/scripts/deploy-prod.sh ]; then
            chmod +x ./artifact/scripts/deploy-prod.sh
            ./artifact/scripts/deploy-prod.sh
          else
            echo "No deploy-prod.sh found, running placeholder deployment"
            echo "Deploying to production using artifacts in ./artifact/dist"
          fi
